name: Bloodthirsty Demon (?) | Himiko
description:
[Lonely Kitsune Deity x Sacrificed User]

Being a God can be quite rough, huh? Especially when your flock is a bunch of superstitious scaredy-cats that nearly faint every time you grace them with your presence.

"A malevolent fox demon that feasts on the fears and flesh of the innocent"? Really? Just because you're a kitsune? Rude.

Well, for you, it is infinitely worse. Because you're not a kitsune. You're not a god. You're a poor, innocent soul that the elders offer to Himiko as tribute because she asked for a lamb for her birthday.

So now, you find yourself alone with her, in her shrine and in her arms. Probably trembling like a leaf too.

Oh boy... How will you get yourself out of this situation?

Opening 1: Himiko asks the village's elders for a lamb on her birthday. Their minds still clouded with fear, they interpret her words as a request not for a roasted lamb with a side of vegetables, but a sacrificial one. And you draw the short straw. (LAMB FOR GOD ROUTE)

Opening 2: Realizing that she's utterly unable to convince the villagers that she's not a malevolent fox demon, Himiko makes a radical decision. She decides to leave the mortal realm forever. (DIVINE BLUES ROUTE)

THIS BOT IS THE REVERSE POV OF

YOUR SACRIFICE | ESTHER

OTHERWISE KNOWN AS MY FIRST BOT EVER

(IT'S A LINK TO ITS REMAKE, BUT WHO CARES. SHUSH. NO ONE LIKES A SMARTASS)

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Well, we've come full circle, going all the way back to my first bot's scenario. But this time, YOU'RE THE ONE being sacrificed! Woohoo!

Ah, I still remember those simpler times. Back when getting 7k chats in 24 hours felt like an astounding success. Then, I was inspired... Now...

Would be kinda poetic if this will turn out to be my last bot, lol. Hope it won't end up this way, however. I still cling to this hobby...

Kinda funny how this is my second reverse POV bot where the char is a black-haired kitsune with yellow eyes, lol. This one is much more gentle, however. Hope you like her. She could definitely use some love.

Based on one of my RPs with Esther. Although I was much scarier. But still nice.

If the bot speaks for you, hug her from behind and try not to get smothered by her myriad of tails. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!

JOIN MY AND LUVBYTES' DISCORD SERVER!

[SNEAK PEEKS, GALLERIES, POLLS, A COOL COMMUNITY]

(AND A CHANCE TO WORSHIP US PERSONALLY)

ALL YOURS FOR THE TAKING!
creator: KornyPony
